commandsRun.command:
cd /home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm && node --input-type=module <<'NODE'  # read-only viem evidence collector; writes mission evidence/live-evidence.json
NODE
commandsRun.observation: Collected manifest bytecode checks, governance role graph, AccessManager delays, historical borrow simulations, borrower health-factor reads, market snapshot reads, oracle freshness timing, pause log scan, and reserve-claim simulations into mission evidence.

commandsRun.command:
python3 - <<'PY'  # write lending-deploy-b flow report JSON
PY
commandsRun.observation: Wrote the final flow report to the consolidated-deployment user-testing flows directory.

steps.action: Read all 12 manifest contract addresses and query eth_getCode/getBytecode for each
steps.expected: Every manifest address returns non-zero bytecode
steps.observed: All 12 manifest addresses returned non-zero bytecode; byte lengths ranged from 2474 (RiskAdapter) to 16508 (Governor).

commands: getBytecode() for every address in manifest.contracts

steps.action: Query AccessManager role 0 membership and Timelock role assignments on-chain
steps.expected: Timelock holds AccessManager admin, Governor holds Timelock proposer role, and EOAs do not hold admin power
steps.observed: AccessManager role 0 is held only by timelock 0x6571…9C60; timelock minDelay is 60; governor 0xa6d2…21b3 has PROPOSER_ROLE and CANCELLER_ROLE; timelock self-admin is true; deployer/riskAdmin/treasury/minter all lack Timelock DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE and AccessManager role 0.

steps.action: Query AccessManager role membership and access records for riskAdmin, treasury, and minter
steps.expected: Sensitive roles have non-zero execution delays
steps.observed: riskAdmin, treasury, and minter are all active members with executionDelay/currentDelay = 60 seconds.

assertions.title: Oracle staleness blocks borrows

steps.action: Check canonical oracle freshness window on the live deployment and determine whether a stale-read borrow simulation is possible
steps.expected: A live read-only borrow simulation or historical receipt demonstrates OraclePriceStale
steps.observed: Not provable on the canonical deployment: current oracle age is 6588s < maxAge 21600s, and even age since oracle deployment is 7308s < 21600s, so the canonical oracle has never yet entered a stale window. No stale-borrow receipt/hash exists in the canonical artifacts.

commands: oracle deployment block timestamp minus latest block timestamp

assertions.issues: Evidence is insufficient for the assertion as written because the live canonical oracle has not yet become stale and the artifacts contain no stale-borrow proof.

steps.action: Replay a read-only borrow simulation at the historical post-collateral block 6484379 from borrower 0x36a8…D2dF with amount 4,000,000.000000000000000001 USDC
Replay a read-only borrow simulation at the historical post-collateral block 6484379 from borrower 0x36a8…D2dF with amount 1 wei
steps.observed: Historical simulation reverted with DebtBelowMinimum(debt=1, minBorrowAmount=100000000000000000000).

assertions.title: Pause blocks borrows but allows repay

steps.action: Scan live LendingCore logs from deployment to latest for Paused/Unpaused and any repay receipt that occurred during a paused window
steps.expected: A paused interval exists so borrow-revert and repay-success can be verified on the live surface
steps.observed: No Paused or Unpaused logs exist on the canonical LendingCore, and the only observed Repaid event (tx 0x02825742…1dde) occurred without any paused-state evidence. Current paused() is false, so pause-specific behavior cannot be validated read-only from live history.

assertions.issues: No live paused window or paused-flow artifact exists on the canonical deployment, so the assertion cannot be proven from the assigned read-only surface.

steps.action: Read healthFactor and availableToBorrow for active borrower 0x36a8…D2dF and recompute both values from current quote data
steps.expected: Both calls return without revert and match the contract formulas
steps.observed: healthFactor returned 1559989600069332871 and availableToBorrow returned 29999333333333333334; both exactly matched manual recomputation from collateralValue=200e18, currentDebt=100000666666666666666, maxLtv=6500, liquidationThreshold=7800.

steps.action: Read DebtPool.totalAssets, availableLiquidity, outstandingPrincipal, reserveBalance, and utilizationBps
steps.observed: All five reads returned values, and their internal accounting identities matched: totalAssets=23900000869489729954306, availableLiquidity=19692857046247172862220, outstandingPrincipal=4207143823242557092086, reserveBalance=96609969994922, utilizationBps=1760.

assertions.title: Reserve claims restricted to treasury role

steps.action: Simulate claimReserves() directly from an unauthorized EOA and directly from the treasury EOA using the live reserveBalance
steps.expected: Unauthorized call reverts and treasury-role call succeeds
steps.observed: Unauthorized direct call from deployer reverted with AccessManagedUnauthorized as expected, but direct treasury-role call also reverted with AccessManagerNotScheduled because the live treasury role has a 60-second execution delay. No ReservesClaimed log exists on the canonical deployment to prove a scheduled success path.

assertions.issues: The live deployment’s delayed treasury role contradicts the assertion’s direct-success expectation, and there is no scheduled reserve-claim receipt to satisfy the success half of the check.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 7 passed, 3 failed (VAL-LEND-009, VAL-LEND-012, VAL-LEND-015).
